rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are valid AADL features or declared helpers in the same annex.
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output feature bindings instead.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are visible in the current scope and properly declared.
Use only valid AADL feature names and declared auxiliary variables in AGREE expressions to prevent resolution errors.
AGREE scalar types must be int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified or invalid type names.
If a guarantee expression has type <error>, trace and resolve the first unresolved identifier on the same line.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks in valid component type or implementation scopes.
Assignments in implementation scope should target existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types that are not present in the AADL model's configured dependencies.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output bindings instead.
